recent_excerpts: Recorded Future warns that autonomous 'agentic' AI systems, now being integrated into enterprise software, create new attack surfaces for prompt injection, data poisoning, and…
An unauthorized group accessed Anthropic's exclusive Claude Mythos Preview AI, a cybersecurity tool capable of generating exploits and malware.
CVE-2026-5752 (CVSS 9.3) in Cohere AI's Terrarium sandbox enables root-level code execution and container escape via JavaScript prototype chain traversal.
